# maximumSequenceLength

**Instance Property**

The maximum number of tokens in sequence for which the embedding generates vectors.

## Declaration

```swift
var maximumSequenceLength: Int { get }
```

## Discussion



Inputs longer than the token limit will be truncated, and only the first `maximumSequenceLength` tokens will be processed to generate embeddings.

`NLContextualEmbedding` works best with text snippets at the sentence or paragraph level. The model truncates text that exceeds this maximum length and only processes the truncated portion of the input.

## Inspecting the contextual embedding

- **dimension**: The dimensionality of the embedding vectors generated by the model.
- **hasAvailableAssets**: A Boolean value that indicates whether assets are available on-device.
- **languages**: The languages that the contextual embedding supports.
- **modelIdentifier**: A string that uniquely identifies the embedding model.
- **revision**: The version number the contextual embedding uses.
- **scripts**: The writing systems that the language uses.
